package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for unscoped_query_without_explicit_danger_naming: `Unscoped()` usage in generic repository methods without a clearly dangerous or admin-only name.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule213NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule213NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule213NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario213Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule213NegativeService, input Rule213NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
